TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: qba' ru qba (ke' na Plmukan: 手 ) ga spiyang balay qbuci hi' / hi na kneril ru mlikuy. qutux hi' ga sazing kinlgan qba' ta. kya kwara' mopuw tluling na squliq hiya'. == kinhulan s'utu biru ==
S.PHON: qβaʔ ru qβa (keʔ na plmukan: * ) ɣa s~ɕpijaŋ βalaj qβuʦ~ʨi ħiʔ / ħi na kneril ru mlikuj. qutux ħiʔ ɣa s~ɕaziŋ kinlɣan qβaʔ ta. kja kwaraʔ mopuw tluliŋ na s~ɕquliq ħijaʔ. == kinħulan s~ɕʔutu βiru ==
S.FORM: qba' ru qba (ke' na Plmukan: 手 ) ga spiyang balay qbuci hi' / hi na kneril ru mlikuy. qutux hi' ga sazing kinlgan qba' ta. kya kwara' mopuw tluling na squliq hiya'. == kinhulan s'utu biru ==
S.PHON: qβaʔ ru qβa (keʔ na plmukan: * ) ɣa s~ɕpijaŋ βalaj qβuʦ~ʨi ħiʔ / ħi na kneril ru mlikuj. qutux ħiʔ ɣa s~ɕaziŋ kinlɣan qβaʔ ta. kja kwaraʔ mopuw tluliŋ na s~ɕquliq ħijaʔ. == kinħulan s~ɕʔutu βiru ==
